title: SUPPLY OF WHITE SORGHUM SEEDS (14 TONS)
description: VEGRAB Organic Farming Limited invites eligible suppliers to submit tenders for the supply of White Sorghum seeds (14 tons) for delivery to Ulyankulu (Tabora) and Mpanda Municipality (Katavi). Seeds must be clean, dry, food-grade, moisture not exceeding 13%, packed in 2kg bags.

contact_info.address: P.O. Box 70736, 7th Floor, B&N House of Apartments, Mabibo Mwisho, Block No. 42, Kigogo Street, Dar es Salaam
